publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: Creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Big Red Marching Band

did.physdesc: Audio Recordings, Computer Media, Correspondence, Memorabilia, Newspapers, Photographs, Publications, Scrapbooks
did.abstract: Material documenting the history of the Cornell University Big Red Marching Band, including print and audio visual items.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST

emph.ref: Series I. Photo Albums and Scrapbooks
Series II. Photographs not in Albums

arrangement.p: Box 3 Folder 15, 21Box 4 Folders 19-29, 31-36Box 6, Bow, Buttons, 4 Plaques
Box 5, 5 tapes, 16 CDs Box 6, 3 VHS, 1 BETABox 7, Reel to Reel Film, 5 Mini-Records, 17 Records, Box 12, 12 reels.

odd.head: General
odd.p: See also Cornell University football motion pictures movies, videos, and film, #40-2-2205

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Big Red Band records, #37-6-3112. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: "Big Red Band Notes," newsletters; "Through the years with the Cornell University Big Red Marching Band," 1990; clippings; t-shirts, 1983, 2001-2003; and alumni visor hat. Also, movie films of band shows from the late 1940s through the late 1950s, and Big Red Marching Band CDs 1997, 2007, 2008. 16mm motion picture films are in color and black and white. Includes footage of the bannd at Niagara, Princeton, Columbia 1948; University of Pennsylvania, n.d.; Presidential Review, 20 May, 1954; Coumbia 1 November 1958; Penn. crew formation. Other reels are unidentified.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Includes files, photographs, scrapbooks, and recordings.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also, a clarinet played by Matthew Palumbo; its bell cracked from the cold at a home football game in 1981.

did.unittitle: Series I. Photo Albums and Scrapbooks
Presenting the Big Red Band and Alumni Band
Cornell Big Red Marching Band: The Only REAL Marching Band in the Ivy League
The Only REAL Yearbook of the Only REAL Marching Band in the Ivy League Part I
The Only REAL Yearbook of the Only REAL Marching Band in the Ivy League Part II
The Only REAL Yearbook of the Only REAL Marching Band in the Ivy Leauge
The Cornell University Big Red Marching Band: Volume I
The Cornell University Big Red Marching Band: Volume II
The Cornell University Big Red Marching Band: Volume III
Series II. Photographs not in Albums

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Photos were originally taken by Harvey Rothschild, class of 1963

did.unittitle: Big Red Band Storms Lake Placid
Big Red Band photos of first rehearsal, auditions, band camp, Brown, Bucknell, Columbia, Yale and first night
Big Red Band photos of Cornell Days, Harvard, first marching practice, homecoming, March to North, Montreal
Big Red Band photos of Stewart Park, Penn, Princeton, recruitment, semi-formal and spring concert
Big Red Band Large Print Group Photograph
Oversize band photos see CD-1671 in Box 5 for a CD with scanned images of these photos
CD of scanned images of the oversize photographs found in box 9

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes "I Played at Carnegie Hall" shirts. Cornell Museum items ids 1243, 1244, 1185-1188

did.unittitle: Drawing done for Big Red Band similar to a New Yorker magazine cover

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Created by Victor Seidel for 1988 Homecoming

Big Red Band Alumni Association meeting
The Big Red Roof Inn buttons given to the band
Big Red Band drawings and artwork
Record: Cornell University Concert Band, Cornell Radio Guild Inc., William A. Campbell, conductor.
Record: Cornell University Concert Band, Bailey Hall
Record: Cornell University Wind Ensemble, Marice Stith, conductor, Bailey Hall
Record: Cornell University Wind Ensemble, Marice Stith, conductor, Bailey Hall
Record: Cornell University Symphonic Band, Memorial Room, Willard Straight Hall
Record: Cornell University Wind Ensemble, Bailey Hall
Record: Cornell University Big Red Marching Band, Bailey Hall
Record: Cornell University Big Red Marching Band Presents: Fight Songs of the North East

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Features the band playing fight songs from Cornell, Army, boston college, Boston University, Brown, Bucknell, Columbia, Colgate, Dartmouth, Harvard, Holy Cross, Navy, Penn State, Pennsylvania University, Princeton, Pittsburgh, Rutgers, Syracuse, Temple, Vermont, Villanova, West Virginia and Yale.

did.unittitle: Film can and leader is labeled Cornell Band Roll. 1 Niagara, Princeton, Columbia, reel itself is labeled 1937 Syracuse, Colgate, Columbia, but may be a reused reel.
Label on can says early before 1953? band day. Reel itself says "This is Cornell" R-1. Footage is in color.

dao.xlink:title: Cornell Big Red Band at the 1956 Cornell vs. Navy Football Game [Delivery]

daodesc.p: Cornell Big Red Band at the 1956 Cornell vs. Navy Football Game [Delivery]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes footage of Bill the Goat the live Navy mascot and also Touchdown the Cornell bear costumed human in addition to the band formations. May include footage from other games as well.

did.unittitle: Unknown game at Cornell, date based on formation spelling out 1956. Footage shows the opposing team's band performance as well as Cornell's. Color.
Princeton at Cornell, includes card listing formations, also labeled as Fall Weekend 1958-59, Lionel Hampton, Dad's Day
VHS: Cornell University Marching Band, Halftime of Pittsburgh Steelers at Buffalo Bills game (3 copies)
Big Red Bands Alumni Association website crawl
